description_long: This object is a futuristic, compact airplane with a dark, metallic body and a streamlined, angular design. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection, each featuring circular, iridescent markings near the tips. The central fuselage is robust, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit that has a dark, tinted canopy. The top of the fuselage displays a grid-like panel, possibly representing a vent or solar array, and there are several metallic bolts and structural details visible along the wings and body. The tail section is short and blocky, with dual vertical stabilizers and mechanical components exposed at the rear. The overall appearance suggests a high-tech, possibly unmanned or advanced piloted aircraft suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with a dark metallic body, straight mid-mounted wings, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. It features dual vertical stabilizers and iridescent markings on the wings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the forward-enclosed cockpit, wide straight wings, and grid-like panel on top.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the angular nose, wing details, and visible bolts, with the cockpit canopy profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the dual vertical stabilizers, exposed mechanical components, and the blocky tail section.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the wing's iridescent markings and the side of the cockpit.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and slight anhedral angle; features circular iridescent markings near the tips.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; possible internal or embedded propulsion system.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with dual vertical stabilizers and a short, blocky tail section.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear, partially visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single-seat.
